reviews.review_title: Update broke Left Foot Foward Rotation!!
reviews.review_description:
The newest update was a set backward, in my opinion.  If you ride left foot forward, you spin to the right.  Now, both directions on the thumbstick rotate to the left meaning you can't assist your spin with the thumbstick anymore!  And why was the "pitch" setting added?  It's VR, there is no need for auto camera movement!  Instead of development time being spent on useless features like "pitch", I would much prefer a setting for gravity and other physics.  Riding with no brake leaves both trigger buttons unused.  Maybe assign the ability for hang fives to one of those or maybe ability to do a one handed x-up?  I still believe this game to be FAR superior to the new VMX, but that game has communication with the player base, a road map, and consistent updates.  It's getting harder and harder to stay optimistic here with the stagnant silence...

Also, don't listen to the review claiming you can't do tricks in air.  That's preposterous!  Everyone one new to this game NEEDS to complete the tutorial before doing anything else.  If people did, there wouldn't be such dumb reviews.  This game is pretty hard but that's what makes it so awesome once it clicks!  You have such ability to be precise!

You can barely even turn in mid air. And what's a bmx game without even turning in the air everything else is fine you just can't even do tricks in mid air it's impossible so i'm really hoping in the future for you to fix the turning in midair it's impossible so please fix this soon

This a really good game you can do flips, tailwhips, bar spins and more!
I highly recommend this game and worth it for the price and this game is VERY UNDERRATED

Despite some of the other reviews on this page, this game has a particularly good (if not a bit boosted) physics engine. However I would argue it is one of the hardest to master due to its depth. If you really enjoying bmxing or biking then this absolutely is the app for you as you can ride at beyond a professional level however you have to continue to play the game and understand how everything works. My only criticism is the lack of clarity regarding updates as the creator KOG is often quiet about them. Other than that 10/10

I have been playing this game for about 2 days now, and its been the worst 2 days of my time in vr. The tricks dont work, the tutorial for tricks are so unbelievably vague that its almost not even english, the missions dont work, turning mid air is impossible, I keep falling through the floor and every time i do a mission, it says I didnt do the trick even though I blatantly did. Fix your game 1/10.
The game is OK it's just a little glitchy like when i try to do a jump there is something that is blocking me

Why would you get rid of smooth turning? I don’t understand what made that decision make sense to the developer you broke your game. I can’t turn 360° when my VR headset is plugged in. Did that not compute? Also if I’m in a small play space I can’t turn because I’m in a small play space. You had a smooth turning available. Why would you get rid of it? Bring it back. This game went from a five star to a one star. Just wait for VMX. YOU CAN TURN IN VMX

It’s overall a bad game with many bugs and glitches and the maker clearly didnt spend more than five min of making the game so don’t buy it.

Tutorial is broken nearly completely, you cannot keep traction for some reason and the rear slides away, you can even complete a tutorial level because you start falling through the floor in a perpetual loop of respawning. 
There's a bug with trying to get back on your bike after falling, it says you're too close to a wall even though you aren't. 
I see people saying the creator took 10 minutes to make this game, absolute nonsense, I'd like to see them try making this game themselves. 

Overall good game, just a few bugs to be ironed out.
